data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for photo/video release within the same form.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the presence of a photo/video release within the same form as part of the liability waiver. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or API reads that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The lack of concrete evidence regarding the inclusion of the photo/video release in the waiver indicates that the validation cannot be conclusively determined at this time.
gaps: No evidence confirming the inclusion of photo/video release within the same form.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify photo/video release inclusion
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if the waiver form includes a section for photo/video release.
